name: Credit by curel
description_short: Credit by Curel is a Miami-based credit repair company offering credit dispute and restoration services to help consumers improve their credit reports and scores.
description_long:
Credit by Curel operates as a credit repair and debt service company headquartered in Miami, Florida, at 848 Brickell Ave, Ph 5. The company is categorized under fix-my-credit services, focusing on credit restoration and dispute resolution. Based on available information, Credit by Curel positions itself within the credit repair industry, which typically involves disputing inaccurate or negative items on consumer credit reports with the three major credit bureaus.

The company offers credit repair services aimed at helping consumers improve their credit profiles. While specific service details are limited in the available data, credit repair companies in this category typically dispute errors, unauthorized accounts, late payments, collections, and other negative items reported to credit bureaus. Credit by Curel operates from their Brickell Avenue location in Miami and can be reached at (404) 901-4322. Their website is creditbycurel.com.

Credit by Curel maintains business hours Monday through Thursday from 8:30 AM to 6:30 PM, with Friday through Sunday closures. The company has received positive feedback, with a 5.0-star rating on Yelp based on one verified review from September 2025. The reviewer noted a "great experience" and indicated satisfaction with the company's service quality and likelihood to refer others.

Potential consumers should note that credit repair services operate within strict legal boundaries set by the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA). While the company shows positive initial ratings, the limited review volume (one review) means potential clients have minimal third-party feedback to evaluate. Prospective customers should verify the company's specific dispute process, timeline expectations, and fee structures before engaging services. As with all credit repair companies, results vary based on individual credit profiles and the legitimacy of reported negative items.
pros: Perfect 5.0-star rating on Yelp from verified customer
Convenient Brickell Avenue location in Miami's financial district
Extended weekday hours (8:30 AM - 6:30 PM Mon-Thu) accommodating working professionals
Customer reported willingness to refer others, indicating satisfaction level
Direct phone contact available at (404) 901-4322 for inquiries
cons: Extremely limited review volume (only 1 verified review) makes it difficult to assess consistent service quality
No detailed service descriptions or pricing information available on public listings
Closed Friday through Sunday, limiting accessibility for customers with weekend availability
Limited publicly available information about dispute success rates or timeline guarantees
No clear documentation of credentials, certifications, or regulatory compliance visible in listing
best_for: Miami-area residents with inaccurate negative items on their credit reports
Consumers seeking in-person credit repair consultation and services
Individuals with flexible weekday availability during business hours
diagnosis: Credit by Curel is best for Miami-area consumers seeking in-person credit repair services to dispute inaccurate items on their credit reports. The main caveat is the extremely limited public review data (one review) and lack of transparent service details, making it essential for prospective clients to contact the company directly to verify specific dispute processes, fee structures, and realistic timeline expectations before committing to services.
services: Credit report dispute filing and management
In-person credit repair services at Miami location
